"Exporting..." : "JSON"} ``` --- ## Summary Table | File | Pattern Type | Count | Details | |------|--------------|-------|---------| | shared-session-view.tsx | Loader2 + animate-spin | 1 | Full-page loading | | session-view.tsx | Custom spinner arc + Loader2 | 3 | Session load, share button, flow diagram | | session-list.tsx | Loader2 + animate-spin | 1 | Search loading indicator | | upload-dialog.tsx | Loader2 + animate-spin + animate-pulse | 3 | Command, upload progress (2 phases) | | dashboard-view.tsx | Border-based spinner + animate-spin + animate-pulse | 3 | Dashboard load, CSV export, JSON export | **Total Patterns Found:** 11 instances across 5 files **Key Observations:** - All spinners use `animate-spin` CSS class from Tailwind - Primary icon source: `Loader2` from lucide-react (7 instances) - Alternative spinner: Custom CSS border-based spinners (4 instances) - Color themes: `cyan-400`, `cyan-500`, `zinc-500`, `violet-500` - Additional animation: `animate-pulse` used for processing/indeterminate states
